raw_content:
{
  "news": [
    {
      "title": "数字信贷市场遭杠杆清算抛售",
      "summary": "数字信贷市场出现大规模抛售，Strive CEO将原因归咎于杠杆清算。这可能影响DeFi借贷协议和相关的代币（如AAVE、COMP等），导致价格下跌。市场恐慌情绪可能蔓延，看空信号。",
      "reason": "链上异动，大规模清算可能导致连锁反应，影响DeFi板块。",
      "category": "链上异动",
      "impact_coins": ["AAVE", "COMP", "MKR"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 4,
      "sources": [{"name": "CoinDesk", "url": "https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/06/19/digital-credit-market-hit-by-record-selloff-as-strive-ceo-blames-leverage-liquidations"}],
      "urgency": "hours"
    },
    {
      "title": "富兰克林邓普顿申请股息再投BTC ETF",
      "summary": "富兰克林邓普顿向SEC提交申请，拟发行一种新型ETF，该ETF将股票股息再投资于比特币。这意味着传统金融市场资金将通过股息流入比特币，增加购买压力。若获批，将显著推动比特币需求，看多信号。",
      "reason": "机构创新产品，可能带来增量资金，属于ETF机构类重要消息。",
      "category": "ETF机构",
      "impact_coins": ["BTC"],
      "signal": "bullish",
      "impact_level": 4,
      "sources": [{"name": "The Block", "url": "https://www.theblock.co/post/405402/franklin-templeton-files-for-etfs-that-reinvest-stock-dividends-into-bitcoin?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss"}],
      "urgency": "days"
    },
    {
      "title": "比特币微交易激增，活跃度近新高",
      "summary": "比特币链上微交易数量激增，推动活跃度接近历史纪录。这反映了比特币作为支付手段的采用增加，对基本面构成支撑，但短期内对价格影响有限。中性偏多信号。",
      "reason": "链上数据异常，显示网络使用增长，长期利好。",
      "category": "链上异动",
      "impact_coins": ["BTC"],
      "signal": "neutral",
      "impact_level": 2,
      "sources": [{"name": "CoinTelegraph", "url": "https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-activity-nears-record-highs-on-microtransaction-surge?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss"}],
      "urgency": "days"
    },
    {
      "title": "Arthur Hayes向交易所存入6000枚ETH",
      "summary": "BitMEX联合创始人Arthur Hayes向FalconX和Galaxy Digital存入6000枚ETH，价值约1200万美元。大额ETH转入交易所通常被视为抛售信号，可能对ETH价格构成下行压力。看空信号。",
      "reason": "巨鲸异动，大额转入交易所意味着潜在抛压。",
      "category": "链上异动",
      "impact_coins": ["ETH"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 3,
      "sources": [{"name": "金色财经", "url": "https://jinse.com.cn/lives/518364.html"}],
      "urgency": "hours"
    },
    {
      "title": "Kevin Warsh打压降息预期，宏观利空",
      "summary": "美联储理事Kevin Warsh发表鹰派言论，削弱市场对降息的预期。这导致美元走强，风险资产承压。加密货币作为风险资产，可能面临抛售压力。看空信号。",
      "reason": "宏观经济数据影响风险偏好，利空加密货币。",
      "category": "宏观经济",
      "impact_coins": ["BTC", "ETH"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 4,
      "sources": [{"name": "crypto.news", "url": "https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE0zY1JESTA1a1FjTFdPekx4VFN1NUFka0V4VG92dnY4OEVUUV9ONWh4S3FaWXZjbERCN0FoWmpiTnhpRjVsVU9JNl95emtzSzh0ZnpOV0k1NHF3azQybHQyZzdn?oc=5"}],
      "urgency": "hours"
    },
    {
      "title": "CFTC对Celsius创始人实施永久交易禁令",
      "summary": "CFTC与Celsius创始人Mashinsky达成和解，永久禁止其交易。该事件标志监管对加密行业违规行为的持续打击，可能加剧市场对监管不确定性的担忧，但对具体币种影响有限。中性偏空信号。",
      "reason": "监管政策延续，影响市场情绪。",
      "category": "监管政策",
      "impact_coins": ["CEL"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 2,
      "sources": [{"name": "Investment Executive", "url": "https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikAFBVV95cUxOREc5Nnhwb0YzOFhvcWNKYVVNSlMyd1lOdktseEFJOE1GZHlqNFZiZEhKejRMMmMwNjdPdVROd0d1czhrRmpnTWw1aUI2cTVGWWlTMlE5cTBGeTZ0Y2F1dGlGYlctY3hQWE82TTg5RUl2WmFKWDJhVHV5clFIbjQzQjFEOHgyRE1iem13cFEzLUg?oc=5"}],
      "urgency": "days"
    }
  ]
}
